title: Maeril
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Maeril''' was a [[Draedan/Legends|Draedan]] dictator who ruled one of [[Sesid/Legends|Sesid's]] major nations. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Sesid, [[Arvel Trace]], armed Maeril's military with Imperial weapons. In return, Maeril and another dictator, [[Feynir]], conquered other Draedan nations and shared the spoils with the Empire.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}}
